name: C-20 --edition records the framework-edition identifier in the trace for compliance versioning
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --edition 2017-v3 --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q '2017-v3' trace.json && echo edition 1>&2
